heroHeadline:
Trump Rejects Ceasefire;
Iran Hits Gulf, Baghdad Embassy
heroSubtitle: Day 16: Both US and Iran reject international ceasefire mediation. Iran fires 9 ballistic missiles + 33 UAVs at UAE, 7 drones at Saudi Riyadh, 4 ballistic at Qatar — all intercepted. US Embassy Baghdad helipad struck by missile, air defense system destroyed. Putin calls Trump with diplomatic proposals. Pentagon 'still ramping up.' Iran Health Ministry: 1,444+ killed; HRANA: 2,800+; Lebanon: 773+ killed, 800K displaced. US KIA: 13.
footerNote: Data compiled from 100+ sources across 4 media poles as of March 15, 2026. All contested claims are marked. Multi-pole sourcing active.
